programme.title: Macario
programme.desc: Poor and hungry peasant Macario wishes to have a good meal for All Saint's Day. After his wife cooks him a turkey he has three apparitions: The Devil, God, and the Death.

programme.title: Los novios de mis hijas
programme.desc: Una viuda, su ahijado y sus cuatro hijas se verán envueltos en un drama familiar, en el que también se involucrarán los jóvenes que las cortejan.

programme.title: Macario
programme.desc: Poor and hungry peasant Macario wishes to have a good meal for All Saint's Day. After his wife cooks him a turkey he has three apparitions: The Devil, God, and the Death.

programme.title: No Happy Ending
programme.desc: 44-year-old masseuse Larissa Macriello vanishes from her Miami apartment in June of 2013. Police find there's a dangerous edge to her carefree lifestyle, and they're thrust into a web of sex, lies, and secrets as they try to find her.

programme.title: Silent Killer
programme.desc: Diane Girts is found dead in the bathtub of her home adjoining her husband's funeral home, and nobody can determine exactly how she died. As the case unfolds, detectives will uncover troubling clues pointing to a cunning and dangerous killer.

programme.title: Murder-in-Law
programme.desc: When Nancy Lyon dies of a mysterious illness, her father tells police she was poisoned by her husband. But the case uncovers family secrets with shocking implications into the 1991 death of this Dallas woman.

programme.title: Broken Trust
programme.desc: Who we choose to trust can be a life-or-death decision. When trust is betrayed, it can have deadly consequences, and in the blink of an eye, the world we thought was safe can become unrecognizable and terrifying.

programme.title: The Landlord
programme.desc: Ep 1.1 "The Landlord" Karen Jenkins' building is in a tough part of town. But she's determined to help the neighborhood-and all of her tenants along with it. The problem is that each of them seems to have something to hide - And one of them will do anything to keep those secrets safe.

programme.title: Brother VS Brother
programme.desc: Ep 1.6 "Brother VS Brother" Two brothers run a lucrative snow removal business. But one of them grows devoted to a spiritual group and its enigmatic guru; while the other finds a more illicit path to enlightenment. The only thing that can stop this family feud - is murder.

programme.title: Home Protection
programme.desc: Ep 1.9 "In-Law, Outlaw" A California real estate agent gives in to his wife's wish that her mother move in with the couple, and their kids. But what begins as a compassionate gesture turns into a bitter war of wills between husband, wife and mother-in-law - leading to bloodshed.

programme.title: Collateral Damage
programme.desc: Ep 1.10 "Collateral Damage" When the pillar of a remote Utah community is approached by an old acquaintance with a plan to make money, an exciting partnership is formed. But as their venture falls apart, access to a valuable cache of weapons, becomes a motive for betrayal - and murder.

programme.title: La separación

programme.title: Benito regresa
programme.desc: Benito está de regreso después de mucho tiempo. Lalo invita a salir a Silvita y comienza a planear su futuro. A los López Pérez les cortan los servicios y dejan sin luz a media colonia.

programme.title: Regalo de aniversario
programme.desc: Con tal de evitar dormir en la bañera, Ludovico debe tener un regalo para Federica antes del día de aniversario.

programme.title: Especial navideño de Bloopers
programme.desc: En este especial de Navidad, se nos muestran los errores de grabación en la serie.

programme.title: Federica desaparece
programme.desc: Los P.Luche asisten a una función de magia, y allí un mago manda a Federica al Medio Oriente quien es secuestrada por secuestradores árabes, pero Federica cree que está en Chiapas y quienes la obligan a trabajar y Ludovico se emociona ya que por fin puede hacer todo lo haría si ella no estuviera.

programme.title: Comandante Alighieri
programme.desc: Junior es atropellado por un panadero y recupera la memoria como policía, llamándose nuevamente Comandante Aligheri. Ahora los P. Luche deben ocultar que ellos fueron quienes lo tuvieron secuestrado haciéndolo pasar como su hijo.

programme.title: El reto
programme.desc: Ludovico y Federica hacen una apuesta en la que cada uno hará el trabajo del otro, es decir uno haría las labores de la casa mientras que la otra trabajaría en Industrias Camerino Robles.

programme.title: Viaje a Cancún
programme.desc: Una pesadilla resulta ser el camino a Cancún para Ludovico y Flavio. Mientras tanto, Federica y Martina deciden ir allí para buscar a sus maridos, aunque terminan quedándose por más tiempo cuando Ludovico y Flavio están varados en una carretera.

programme.title: Lucha interna: Parte II
programme.desc: Le dan trato preferencial a Lucha y hasta un famoso narcotraficante se pone a sus órdenes porque cree que mató a un delincuente. Albertano se corta un mechón por el cual le dan mucho dinero. Lucha se enoja muchísimo al enterarse.

programme.title: Una patita de conejo fresca
programme.desc: Albertano le manda a María la llave de su cuarto para que saque sus cosas, pero ella entiende le pide que se mude con él, con su llave tiene una pata de conejo de la buena suerte pero al ensuciarse, María la tira y le compra una pata nueva.

programme.title: Sed de agua
programme.desc: Doña Lucha aprovecha el corte de agua en la colonia para vender unas cubetas que tenía apartadas. María se pone celosa de la nueva ayudante del equipo de futbol, Citlali, mientras que Albertano se la pasa en la banca por ser mal jugador.

programme.title: Patadas de ahogada
programme.desc: Es el cumpleaños de Albertano y doña Lucha le organiza una fiesta, María se pinta el cabello y se pone su más lindo vestido para recuperar a Albertano, le dedica canciones compuestas por ella y le recita un poema. Doña Lucha se siente mal.

programme.title: Angeloterapeuta
programme.desc: Albertano le pide tiempo a María para pensar en el futuro de su relación y ella va con un brujo para pedirle ayuda. Doña Lucha intenta hablar con el chino sobre sexualidad, por lo que van a la fonda de Don Carmelo, donde ella termina ebria.

programme.title: Sexy calendario
programme.desc: A Doña Lucha se le ocurre hacer un calendario sexy con todas sus vecinas, pero no se vende como ella esperaba. María se pone colágeno en los labios para conquistar a Albertano.

programme.title: Capitán raquetas
programme.desc: Luis está en problemas, ya que deberá armar un plan para evitar que lo echen de su trabajo. Además, doña Magda se actualiza en la moda y se pone uñas nuevas.

programme.title: Guerra de las albóndigas
programme.desc: Lorena y Liz se pelean para saber quién de las dos prepara las mejores albóndigas enchipotladas. Además, Roco recibe la visita de su madre.

programme.title: Cumple Magda
programme.desc: Los vecinos le preparan una fiesta sorpresa a 'Doña Magda' con todo y payaso y piñata. Liz y Lorena participan en un casting para Blancanieves.

programme.title: La visita
programme.desc: Hipólito recibe la visita de su hermano gemelo. Jorjáis emprende un negocio como repartidor de comida y taxi.

programme.title: La herencia de los Rivers
programme.desc: El papá de Lorena se aparece en el departamento de los Rivers para anunciar que heredará a su hija en vida y Germán tiene problemas con los interfones

programme.title: Vidrio roto
programme.desc: Los López Pérez colocan en su departamento un cristal que era para la ventana de Luis y Pedro necesita usar lentes.

programme.title: Las llaves de Angangueo
programme.desc: Los López Pérez reciben una invitación para el evento más importante de Angangueo y Vanesa debe recuperar un perro extraviado de la veterinaria.

programme.title: Seguridad ante todo
programme.desc: Luis le pide a Germán que ponga en el departamento protecciones de seguridad para Luisito Jr. y Rocko hace casting para formar una banda de rock.

programme.title: Cumplemes
programme.desc: Vanesa olvida el cumplememes de Fabián y sus amigos le ayudan a preparar una sorpresa. Un alumno de Silvia le confiesa que está enamorado de ella.

programme.title: Tu nueva mamá
programme.desc: El padre de Lorena regresa con la noticia de que se casó con su enfermera. El Borre y Virginia sacan su app para vender tacos.

programme.title: A lo chino
programme.desc: Los López Pérez tienen un adeudo de agua y Luis les decomisa su televisión. Germán se enamora de Meche, la nueva nana de Luisito Jr.

programme.title: ¿Dónde está Rambo?
programme.desc: Pedro ha extraviado a Rambo y se deprime. La suegra de Alejandra quiere llevar a los López Pérez de vacaciones.

programme.title: Mollejitas 'Mi flaquita'
programme.desc: Arturo tiene la idea de poner un puesto callejero de comida. Pedro y Cris aplican técnicas de feng shui en el departamento para las buenas energías.

programme.title: Vecinos

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: MeatEater - Unconventional: Alaska Sooty Grouse Part 1
programme.desc: In the first part of this series, Steve attempts a unique spring hunt for sooty grouse in the coastal rainforests of southeast Alaska. These mysterious hooters make for a hunt that is markedly different from any other and success doesn't come easily. They say blind squirrels can find a nut, but will Steve harvest a grouse?

programme.title: MeatEater - Unconventional: Alaska Sooty Grouse Part 2
programme.desc: In Part One, Steve experienced the difficulty of hunting the Sooty grouse of southeast Alaska.

programme.title: MeatEater - Wild to Table: Memorable Meals Cooking Special
programme.desc: Steve loves to fish as much as he loves to hunt.Steve is on a river in SW Montana for a day to catch.

programme.title: MeatEater - Up at the Cabin: Prince of Wales Island Black Bear
programme.desc: Last spring, Steve decided to pass up an opportunity to kill a black bear in favor of an extended up close and personal experience. This time, Steve heads back to his shack on Prince of Wales Island and he's brought his friend Paul Neess from Vortex Optics along to share the experience of using a canoe to slip in close to these giant black bears.

programme.title: MeatEater - Southern Traditions: Virginia Doves
programme.desc: All across America hunters kick off the fall hunting season with a weekend of doves, friends, and food. Steve's lifelong friend, Ronny Boehme has invited Steve out to his digs in Virginia for the dove opener. To prep for opening day, Steve and Ron spend a day brushing up on their shooting skills on a sporting clays course followed by a pigeon hunt. Steve shares simple, delicious cooking methods for doves and pigeons.

programme.title: MeatEater - Mountain Meditation: BC Grizzly Bear
programme.desc: Ryan Callaghan and Aaron Evans join Steve on an epic adventure in British Columbia's Rockies to pursue grizzly bears. Steve has long desired to take a grizzly but only if he can do it in a way that fits his personal ethics. The hunt is dampened by frustrating weather but Steve finds a way to fix a tasty meal.

programme.title: MeatEater - Lobster of the Prairie: Wyoming Antelope
programme.desc: Steve is fed up with disrespect for one of the world's most unique game animals-the pronghorn antelope.

programme.title: MeatEater - Land of the Giants: Idaho Mule Deer Part 1
programme.desc: Steve's quest for a giant mule deer buck continues in central Idaho.

programme.title: MeatEater - Land of the Giants: Idaho Mule Deer Part 2
programme.desc: Steve's quest for a giant mule deer buck continues in central Idaho. To help Steve in his journey, Ryan Callaghan has offered up one of his best spots as well as his keen spotting skills. The duo backpack hunt in some of the West's steepest and prettiest mountains seeking the colossal buck of Steve's dreams. In part two Steve finds the buck he's been searching for his whole life. The dream is realized and Steve and Ryan feast on a slow cooked roast.

programme.title: MeatEater - Cooking Special: Butchering a Whole Deer
programme.desc: In this Cooking Special, Steve demonstrates how to butcher a whole whitetail deer.

programme.title: MeatEater - Duren Deer Camp: Wisconsin Whitetail With Helen and Brittany Part 1
programme.desc: Helen Cho and Brittany Brothers are back for a double episode. This time around they're hunting whitetail deer in Wisconsin on the famed Duren farm with Doug Duren and Steve as their guides. Arriving a few days early to scout and tune up their shooting with some squirrel hunting, the ladies enter the next chapter of their hunting journey.

programme.title: MeatEater - Duren Deer Camp: Wisconsin Whitetail With Helen and Brittany Part 2
programme.desc: Helen Cho and Brittany Brothers are back for a double episode.

programme.title: MeatEater - Steve Makes the Team: Kentucky Small Game
programme.desc: Kevin Murphy and his band of Kentucky small game hunters introduce Steve to the finest Kentucky has to offer. Gray squirrels with tree hounds and cottontails with beagles, in Kentucky, it's the dogs that do the hunting. Cathead biscuits, sawmill gravy, and fried small game round out the Kentucky adventure.

programme.title: MeatEater - A Trip of Firsts: Mexico Coues Deer
programme.desc: Steve and Janis head into the remote mountains of Sonora, Mexico, to pursue the elusive Coues deer.

programme.title: Mud and Trees
programme.desc: Wildlife biologist Parker Hall hosts Steve in Missouri for a weekend of chasing giant flathead catfish and gray squirrels along the Missouri River.

programme.title: Blue Mountain Bugles
programme.desc: Steve and Janis Putelis head into the wilds of eastern Washington’s Blue Range for an action-packed archery elk hunt. Janis calls multiple bulls into close range, and Steve connects on a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity.

programme.title: Ghosts of the Chesapeake Part 1
programme.desc: Steve and his friends Ryan Callaghan and Steve Kendrot join up for a Chesapeake Bay adventure as they pursue blue crabs and sika deer.

programme.title: Ghosts of the Chesapeake Part 2
programme.desc: The adventure in Maryland continues as the guys have a successful sika deer hunt and throw an East Shore crab boil with local oysters and a homemade smoked sika deer ham.

programme.title: Turkey Troubles
programme.desc: Steve and Janis Putelis escort first-time hunters Tracy and Maggie on a Montana turkey hunt. Emotions run high as the new hunters deal with failures and successes.

programme.title: Lovett or Leave It (An In-Studio Spectacular)
programme.desc: Lovett’s getting married, but before he walks down the aisle, he heads into the studio, joining The Bulwark’s Tim Miller to talk ballrooms, breaking news, and Trump’s big, sloppy slush fund. Then Lovett or Leave It writers Halle Kiefer and Sarah Lazarus stop by to share some rehearsal dinner roast jokes, and for a wedding present, they gift Lovett something blue: the coveted Sapphic Token. As his dream foretold! Congrats, boss!

programme.title: Offline with Jon Favreau (Breaking the Cycle of Political Violence)
programme.desc: Does political violence ever help a social cause? Zayd Ayers Dohrn, playwright and host of Crooked's "Mother Country Radicals," joins Offline to discuss the complicated legacy of radical activism in America. In his new book, Dangerous, Dirty, Violent, and Young, Zayd dives even deeper into the morally ambiguous decisions made by his parents...two founding members of the notorious Weather Underground. He and Jon contemplate what activist actions lead to mass alienation vs. adoption of ideals, why a generation of Americans gravitated towards political violence in the 1970s...and why it's happening again today.

programme.title: Pod Save America (The Bruised Hand in the Cookie Jar)
programme.desc: Trump's DOJ launches a $1.7 billion fund to make payments to his allies, as Democrats revive the debate about whether to make Trump's declining fitness—even his increasingly discolored hands—a campaign issue. Jon, Lovett, and Tommy weigh the pros and cons and react the rest of the news, including Trump taking revenge on Bill Cassidy and Thomas Massie, his new plotting against Cuba and Greenland, and the latest on negotiations with Iran.

programme.title: Keep It (The Colbert Necessities)
programme.desc: Louis Virtel is joined by Guy Branum to discuss the Canadian magic of Martin Short and his new documentary Marty, Life is Short. Then, Louis and Guy chat about The Late Show with Stephen Colbert ending and what that means for late night television. Plus, friend of the show Mandy Moore returns to chat pop music and her new movie The Breadwinner.

programme.title: Little Angels Of The Night
programme.desc: When two blonde "call girls" are brutally murdered in Mrs. Dolly Smith's apartment building, Kelly and Kris reluctantly go undercover as prostitutes and move into Mrs. Smith's establishment. On their first day at work, the trio arouses suspicion with their clever tactics to avoid meeting with "customers." But the Angels are more interested in the Italian restaurant across the street, where Freddie, the macho delivery boy works. He brings pizza to the girls in the building almost every day, and always acts aggressive and threatening. Then Bonnie, another blond girl, is attacked but manages to escape. When she says her assailant smelled like a restaurant, it looks like Freddie is the man. Freddie swears he's innocent, and when his shark's tooth pendant is found beside the latest victim, Sabrina wonders if it isn't a bit too obvious a clue. The owner of the Italian restaurant, Roman Vail, also has access to the apartment building, and the. Angels are surprised to learn that he knows Freddie lost his pendant. Also the last victim died with bits of skin under her fingernails, and Vail's arms show many scratch marks. When Sabrina and Kelly finally put the evidence together, they must rush to rescue blond-haired Kris who is alone in the restaurant with Vail. Kate Jackson, Jaclyn Smith and Cheryl Ladd star as the Angels, Sabrina Duncan, Kelly Garrett and Kris Munroe, respectively, who work for Charlie, an unseen and very sophisticated boss who phones in their instructions. David Doyle stars as Bosley, Charlie's harried assistant.

programme.title: Jade Trap
programme.desc: Charlie uses the Angels plus his own priceless collection of jade as bait to trip up an acrobatic jewel thief and a killer in "THE JADE TRAP." Gigolo Denny Railsback murders wealthy Julie Redmond when she becomes disenchanted. As Denny is doing away with Julie in the living room, cat burglar Ted Machlin is in the bedroom stealing jewels. When Denny spots Ted, he makes it appear that the jewel thief is the murderer. The setting is a posh residential hotel into which Kelly checks as a lonely heiress, Kris as a Swedish movie star and Bosley as a flamboyant auctioneer. Sabrina does her sleuthing as a hotel employee. Kate Jackson, Jaclyn Smith and Cheryl Ladd star as the Angels, Sabrina Duncan, Kelly Garrett and Kris Munroe, respectively, who work for Charlie; an unseen and very sophisticated boss who phones in their instructions. David-Doyle stars as Bosley, Charlie's harried assistant.

programme.title: Angel on the Run
programme.desc: Larry Kantrelle delivers gravel in a dump truck, and he has more than a business relationship with several of his lady customers. One morning en route to see his favorite "customer," a small brown package is tossed into his truck by a pair of thugs in a Cadillac.

programme.title: Antique Angels
programme.desc: Two tanks of radioactive gas are stolen; and the tire track of a 1930's automobile is the Angels' only clue. Since there is an antique auto rally being held nearby, it makes sense to go there and see if anybody looks suspicious.

programme.title: Angels Come Home
programme.desc: At the Grand Prix, the Angels investigate an explosion in a garage. A man named Paul Ferrino tries to murder his old girlfriend Jill by having her drive an experimental car rigged with a bomb.

programme.title: The Sandcastle Murders
programme.desc: Sabrina, Kelly and Kris stalk the sands of Malibu Beach to track down the surfside killer of several young women in "Sandcastles Murders." Police have virtually no leads in their investigation of the "Sandcastle Murders." When one of the victims turns out to be a personal friend of Kris, boss Charlie give the girls permission to handle their own investigation. Kate Jackson, Jaclyn Smith and Cheryl Ladd star as the Angels, Sabrina Duncan, Kelly Garrett and Kris Munroe, respectively, who work for Charlie, an unseen and very sophisticated boss who phones in their instructions. David Doyle stars as Bosley, Charlie's harried assistant.

programme.title: Angel Blues
programme.desc: Stunned by the mysterious death of his favorite folk-rock singer, Charlie sends Kelly, Kris and Sabrina to find everyone who spent time with the victim the night she pied in "Angel Blues." Amy Waters is one of the most popular singers in the country. Shortly after freaking out during a concert performance, Amy calls her dad to say she's coming home by cab to "get straight." But Amy makes a few stops along the way. One of the last people to see her alive is Lenny, the taxi driver Kris becomes acquainted with during the investigation. Kate Jackson, Jaclyn Smith and Cheryl Ladd star as the Angels, Sabrina Duncan, Kelly Garrett and Kris Munroe, respectively, who work for Charlie, an unseen and very sophisticated boss who phones in their instructions. David Doyle stars as Bosley, Charlie's harried assistant.

programme.title: Mother Goose Is Running For His Life
programme.desc: Leland Swinnerton, 70-year-old president of a huge toy corporation, is known to everyone as Mother Goose.

Freddie swears he's innocent, and when his shark's tooth pendant is found beside the latest victim, Sabrina wonders if it isn't a bit too obvious a clue. The owner of the Italian restaurant, Roman Vail, also has access to the apartment building, and the. Angels are surprised to learn that he knows Freddie lost his pendant. Also the last victim died with bits of skin under her fingernails, and Vail's arms show many scratch marks. When Sabrina and Kelly finally put the evidence together, they must rush to rescue blond-haired Kris who is alone in the restaurant with Vail. Kate Jackson, Jaclyn Smith and Cheryl Ladd star as the Angels, Sabrina Duncan, Kelly Garrett and Kris Munroe, respectively, who work for Charlie, an unseen and very sophisticated boss who phones in their instructions. programme.title: Eb Discovers The Birds And The Bees
programme.desc: Eb (Tom Lester) seeks dating advice from the Douglas's after laying eyes on former classmate Betty Jo Bradley from "petticoat Junction." Oliver's well-intentioned guidance has mixed results when Eb hilariously misconstrues the advice he's given.

programme.title: The Hooterville Image
programme.desc: The locals complain that Oliver's penchant for wearing business suits to do farm work is ruining Hooterville's image. Oliver tries to adjust, but the last laugh is on him when Lisa has her dressmaker design Italian him some swanky new overalls.

programme.title: You Ought To Be In Pictures
programme.desc: The Hooterville Chamber of Commerce attempts to attract a Hollywood film studio to shoot a movie in town. And when a rumor spreads that famous actor is arriving, the townsfolk are all abuzz as they prepare for their close-up, Mr. DeMille!

programme.title: A Home Isn't Built In A Day
programme.desc: Fed up with the house being in dire need of repair, Lisa demands that Oliver arrange to have the house redone or she's moving back to New York. Oliver agrees, but is delayed when Mr. Haney claims that their farmhouse is a historic monument.

programme.title: A Square Is Not Round
programme.desc: Everything is topsy-turvy and henhouse hijinks ensue when one of the Douglas' hens is found to be laying square eggs! News of this kind gets around quickly, and the townsfolk all get in on the race to capitalize on the impressive novelty.

programme.title: An Old Fashioned Christmas
programme.desc: Oliver is absolutely determined to have a truly old-fashioned Christmas, including decorating his own farm-grown tree. But warm weather stands in the way and, he discovers, the residents of Hooterville aren't exactly as traditional as he thought.

programme.title: Never Trust A Little Old Lady
programme.desc: In true Hooterville fashion, Oliver (Eddie Albert) discovers that the town is vehemently split as to which weather reporter they trust. As debates rage over which forecast is correct, Oliver plants his tomato crop, hoping for the best.

programme.title: School Days
programme.desc: After another disastrous effort from Lisa in the kitchen, Oliver implores her to take a home economics class at the local high school. Before she knows it, Lisa is a fully enrolled student...the likes of which Hooterville High has never quite seen.

programme.title: His Honor
programme.desc: When the Hooterville City Council appoints Oliver (Eddie Albert) to judge the apple competition at the annual fair, he mistakes the honor for a real judgeship and prepares for his time on the bench! But a run-in with the real law clarifies matters.

programme.title: It's So Peaceful In The Country
programme.desc: Lisa visits Oliver's mother who is recovering from an illness. The doctor advises that she rest in a peaceful environment...and thinks that Hooterville sounds absolutely ideal! Of course, he doesn't know Hooterville, where peace is never�very close.

programme.title: Exodus To Bleedswell
programme.desc: When Oliver (Eddie Albert) discovers that Hooterville has a still-valid contract to build war planes, he spearheads the opening of new government defense plant. But as chaos ensues, Oliver soon wonders if the move was a big mistake after all.

programme.title: It's Human To Be Humane
programme.desc: Lisa is appointed as head of Hooterville's new "Human Humane" committee. A perfect fit for animal-lover Lisa, and a relief from her boredom in the countryside, she soon has a menagerie of both farm and exotic animals living at Green Acres.

programme.title: Never Take Your Wife To A Convention
programme.desc: Oliver takes Lisa along to an agricultural convention. There, Lisa bonds with an ex-gangster couple, who insist upon teaching the Douglas's some of their shortcuts to successful farming. It turns out to be an offer that Oliver can not refuse.

programme.title: The Computer Age
programme.desc: Oliver champions agri-tech as way to increase productivity on the farm, but when a computer gives its assessment of the Douglas' marriage, Lisa (Eva Gabor) begins to question her union with Oliver. It's bits versus bytes in Green Acres!

programme.title: Lisa's Vegetable Garden
programme.desc: Determined to teach his spendthrift wife Lisa how to save money, Oliver insists that she learn about farming...by growing her own vegetables! In her own inimitable fashion, armed with useless pamphlets from Mr. Kimball, Lisa sets to tilling!

programme.title: The Saucer Season
programme.desc: When handyman Eb (Tom Lester) reports he has seen little green men piloting flying saucers, everyone in Hooterville takes him at his word�even the Air Force�and soon the Douglas farm becomes the Roswell of the greater Pixley area!

programme.title: Kimball Gets Fired
programme.desc: Ralph (Mary Grace Canfield) is distraught when her beloved Mr. Kimball, is fired as the county agricultural agent. Out of a job, Kimball (Alvy Moore) no longer has money enough to marry the lady-carpenter-in-waiting! But wait�did he even want to?

programme.title: Addams Cum Laude
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: Cat Addams
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can affect cures.

programme.title: Lurch's Little Helper
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Policy
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson, the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: Lurch's Grand Romance
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler in to a new personality.

programme.title: Ophelia's Career
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family Goes To School
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: Morticia And The Psychiatrist
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: Fester's Punctured Romance
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: Gomez, The Politician
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family Tree
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: Morticia Joins The Ladies League
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where he is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: Halloween With The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: Green Eyed Gomez
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: New Neighbors Meet The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: Wednesday Leaves Home
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family Meets The V.I.P.'s
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: Production And Decay Of Strange Particles
programme.desc: An emergency at a nuclear power plant sets the wheels of man's possible destruction into horrifying motion as radiation gone wild tears open a dimensional hole in the reactor! George MacReady stars as the scientist who struggles to find a solution!

programme.title: The Chameleon
programme.desc: Robert Duvall stars as a CIA agent sent on a mission to infiltrate a downed space craft and kill the creatures inside. Mutated to appear as they do, he soon learns that the shape in which a man finds his own humanity is not always a human one.

programme.title: The Forms Of Things Unknown
programme.desc: Vera Miles and Barbara Rush stars as two women who kill a ruthless blackmailer. Fleeing from their crime, they stumble across an eccentric inventor (David McCallum) obsessed with returning the dead to life….including the man the women murdered.

programme.title: Soldier
programme.desc: In Harlan Ellison's first ever science fiction teleplay, Michael Ansara portrays a man born and bred to be a killing machine who finds himself without a war when a time warp sends him from a future earth to the present day. Lloyd Nolan also stars.

programme.title: Cold Hands, Warm Heart
programme.desc: Star Trek's William Shatner stars as the first man to successfully land on Venus. But when he suddenly starts craving heat -- more heat than humans can stand -- it is just the beginning of a nightmare brought back from The Outer Limits.

programme.title: Behold, Eck!
programme.desc: When a 2-dimensional being, Eck, becomes trapped in our 3-dimensional world, a certain lens made from meteoric quartz is its only hope of an escape from the confines of Earth. Peter Lind Hayes, Joan Freeman and Parley Baer star.

programme.title: Expanding Human
programme.desc: When funding is suddenly cut off for a research project where "expanded humans" are created with consciousness-raising drugs, Star Trek's James Doohan and Skip Homier find themselves prey to science run amok in this suspense-laden "whodunit."

programme.title: Demon With A Glass Hand
programme.desc: In a role written for him by Harlan Ellison, Robert Culp stars as Trent, a man from the future who escapes back into our present. Pursued by an alien race which has conquered future Earth -- the fate of all humankind lies in Trent's glass hand.

programme.title: 44 Harsh Truths About The Game Of Life
programme.desc: What does it mean to win at the game of life? Is it tons of wealth, pure happiness, infinite time, or a loving family? Today we explore the timeless question of what it means to truly live well. Expect to learn the true price of success, whether sacrificing your happiness is worth it, what advice Naval would give to his younger self, what the true source of unhappiness is for most people, how to overcome low self-esteem, what Naval would add to his ‘How To Get Rich’ thread, how to become comfortable being unapologetically selfish, what Naval sees as the next big trends in science and technology, his take on the escalating culture wars, how to get comfortable with death and overcoming grief, the best and worst ways to spend your wealth and much more…

programme.title: How To Overcome The Worst Pain Of Your Life
programme.desc: From Hollywood’s biggest star to a near-tragic ending, Jeremy Renner’s comeback is a story of pain, recovery, and incredible resilience. How did the Oscar nominee fight to bounce back, and what’s next now that he’s fully recovered? Expect to learn the real story of what happened to Jeremy during the snowplow accident, what it feels like to get run over and see your eyeball fall out of it’s socket, how Jeremy was able to recover so well and look as just as he did before the accident, how to deal with excruciating amount of pain, how Jeremy’s meditation practices came in handy during his darkest hours, what it was like being a part of The Avengers & the craziness of being one of the biggest stars in the world, and much more…
